title: riso-overprint-duel-fiat
prompt:
A TWO-COLOR RISOGRAPH zine page, "overprint duel" composition, on warm off-white paper. LEFT: the crowned robed king from the reference, printed in FEDERAL BLUE engraved line work, his ring-hand extended to the right as if commanding. RIGHT: a praying veiled Madonna devotional engraving printed in FLUORESCENT PINK, facing the king. The two figures OVERLAP in the center of the page; where blue and pink inks cross they MULTIPLY into deep purple, forming a contested seam down the middle.

Keep both figures as crisp antique engraving cross-hatch line art. Riso authenticity: registration offset between the pink and blue plates, paper grain, roller streaks. In the purple overprint seam between their hands, place a SINGLE word in bold inscriptional Roman capitals reading "FIAT", knocked out to white paper so it glows. Small Latin caption along the bottom keyline in engraved caps: "REX · ET · REGINA". Tense, symmetrical-but-colliding devotional composition. 8.5x11 zine page.
